channel.title: Projects on Djordje Mihajlovic
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Djordje Mihajlovic

item.title: Machine Learning Knots Tutorial
item.description: This is a introductory Jupyter notebook on machine learning methods. In particular, the examples carried out here aim to get one up to speed with ML concepts such as feed-forward neural networks, long-short term memory networks, decision trees and K-nearest neighbour models in PyTorch and SciKit-Learn.

item.title: Spot-a-Knot Game
item.description: Spot a Knot game for teaching the difficulty in discerning topological objects (specifically knots) from one another for the general public featured in Physics World magazine.
